title: Single Pistol
description: A resource pack that turns crossbows into pistols.
body:
YOU NEED PISTOL DATAPACK AND TEXTURE-PACK TOGETHER, OR ELSE CRAFTING RECIPE WONT WORK. This texture pack changes crossbows into pistols. To get the pistol you will have to craft a bullet and find the rest of the crafting recipe. This texture pack comes with a different crafting recipe making it a little different to obtain the item. Comment on curseforge to request features or report bugs, or go to my discord. 

cursforge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pistol-resourcs-pack-read-descrption-for-it-to](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pistol-resourcs-pack-read-descrption-for-it-to)

discord: [https://discord.gg/zxsZzMdxzg](https://discord.gg/zxsZzMdxzg)
